    x ∈ (fun z => c + z) ⁻¹' ∅ →
      ∀ ⦃y : E⦄,
        y ∈ (fun z => c + z) ⁻¹' ∅ →
          x ≠ y →
            ∀ ⦃a b : 𝕜⦄,
              0 < a →
                0 < b →
                  a + b = 1 →
                    a • (f ∘ fun z => c + z) x + b • (f ∘ fun z => c + z) y < (f ∘ fun z => c + z) (a • x + b • y)
